description:
🕒 16:00–20:30

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Eco-Tourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/morimana-kaeru/

Discover the charm of frogs! During the perfect season for observing wildlife, we'll watch fascinating frogs that lay eggs in trees. Experience rich nature centered on wetlands where many creatures gather. As darkness falls, you might discover something you've never seen before!

【Fee】
Adults ¥6,000, Students ¥5,000 (includes guide, insurance, materials)

【Capacity】
20 people

【Guide】
Mori no Field School staff

【What to bring】
Light snacks, drinks, observation tools (containers, nets), rain gear, light/flashlight, boots (some muddy areas to walk through)

【More information】
Mori no Field School: https://morinomanabiya168.wixsite.com/website
location: 集合 飯能市立博物館前（国際興業バス「OH!!!・天覧山下」または「市民会館・博物館前」下車徒歩3分）
summary: Summer frog watching in the forest! Learn about frogs in Aojishi Valley day and night
